title: MasterClass LMS Portal
description: An interactive web app offering browser-based containers, server command execution, and live compiler feedback for teaching systems design. Built for scale with 150k active students.

title: Github Action: Auto-Linter
description: A customized GitHub action that auto-analyzes React performance hooks and memory usage patterns, with over 45,000 active workspace installations.

title: Next.js 15 Launch Trailer
description: A high-octane, cinematic trailer summarizing the latest framework updates, featuring custom 3D motion graphics and custom soundtracks.

title: Go Concurrency Explained
description: A fast-paced, highly engaging short breakdown of goroutines and channel behaviors using visual analogies and custom typography.

title: Developer Gear 2026 Campaign
description: Global marketing campaign showcasing premium developer peripherals, conceptualizing workspaces as cybernetic control centers.

title: Spaceship Workspace Commercial
description: A cinematic workspace walkthrough showcasing the custom cooling systems and triple-monitor workstation setup in a neon-cyberpunk styling.

title: Quantum Cryptography Portal
description: A customized dashboard visualizing network packet flows and cryptographic handshakes in real time for enterprise network clusters.

title: Cinematic Developer Portraits
description: A curated series of portraits celebrating developer diversity, shot in low-light cybernetic environments using anamorphic prime lenses.
